business.name: Corbett Claims
business.type: Independent Auto and Heavy Equipment Appraisal
business.description: Independent appraisal service founded in 2001 by Ronnie Corbett. Provides damage estimates and valuations on cars, motorcycles, RVs, motorhomes, and heavy farm equipment for insurance companies, attorneys, and private individuals.
business.founderBackground: Independent auto and heavy equipment appraiser since 2001
services: RV and motorhome appraisals (Class A, B, C, travel trailers, fifth wheels)
Heavy farm equipment appraisals (tractors, combines, implements)

coverageArea.regionalDescription: Assignments accepted across the corridor from Texas to Florida and up to Ohio, Illinois, Nevada, and Georgia

differentiators: Truly independent — no ties to any insurer or repair shop
Decades of hands-on appraisal experience across autos, motorcycles, RVs, motorhomes, and heavy farm equipment
Broad equipment scope including heavy farm equipment, which many independent appraisers won't take on
business.sourceNote: Profile updated 2026-05-17 from owner-provided business description (Ronnie Corbett).

project.name: Corbett Claims Website
project.description: Static marketing site for Corbett Claims, an independent auto and heavy equipment appraisal service.
